lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, who are you?

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Ahoy! I'm Cap'n Pudi, currently assisting the Spirit Anglers in their effort against Tempoross.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tempoross? Spirit Anglers? Who are they?

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: You 'aven't heard?! The freak storms? Sailors running into trouble? Ye really must be a landlubber!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Tempoross is some kind o' great sea spirit that's been spookin' sailors and causing crazy storms!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Taiman and his crew were one of the first t' run into it. Washed up outside Al Kharid amongst piles of debris, they did. 'Tis a troublin' time to be a cap'n!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh that doesn't sound good at all!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: It isn't, but worry not. The Spirit Anglers 'ave been formed t' tackle this beastie! We're recruiting all skilled sailors and fisherfolk t' help us.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well I can definitely fish!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Are you sure? It's pretty rough out there and you look like you could do with more experience.

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Excellent!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: The ships on the dock regularly embark to Tempoross Cove. Once there, you'll need to keep the cannons loaded with Harpoonfish t' weaken the Spirit. You can fish 'em on the island.

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: When Tempoross submerges, get up close and clear the fish from its whirlpools; they're how it gets its energy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, that sounds easy enough!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Aye, that be the easy part!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: The storm of Tempoross will rage around you, so you better be ready to deal with lightning strikes and avoid getting zapped when Tempoross attacks the cannons.

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Also, watch out for those mighty waves! You'll want t' tether yourself t' something solid so you don't find yourself lost in the deep blue when they come crashing down!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh... Well, I suppose I can do that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Will I need any special equipment?

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Everythin' you need can be found on-board. Though if you have a favourite harpoon, you can always bring that!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: The complete Spirit Anglers outfit also has an 'andy harness built-in, so you won't need a rope if you're wearin' it. You can speak t' Gita about getting one.

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Ye can find Gita just east of 'ere, next t' some fishin' equipment.

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: When you're ready, just board the ship and we'll set sail soon!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Aye aye cap'n!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are there any benefits to helping the Spirit Anglers?

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: : Other than maintainin' safe passage and savin' lives?!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well...

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: I'm just messin' with ye! Of course there are benefits!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: We find all sorts washed up by the storms. Aside from the usual junk, we often find old chests from merchant supply ships, as well as the odd artefact here and there.

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: If it's not needed for the Spirit Anglers' research, it's yours to keep!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Some of the more resourceful Spirit Anglers also discovered a fishing use for the spirit energised scales shed by the fish within Tempoross. You're free t' keep any you find.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you remind me what to do on the island?

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: The ships on the dock regularly embark to Tempoross Cove. Once there, you'll need to keep the cannons loaded with Harpoonfish t' weaken the Spirit. You can fish 'em on the island.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me more about the Spirit Anglers?

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Well, as I mentioned before, Taiman and his fishing crew from Al Kharid 'ad a tussle with Tempoross. They barely made it back.

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: I was sitting down by the shore enjoying one of Karim's kebabs at the time, when suddenly the crew washed up amongst a pile of debris. Looked like they'd just seen a ghost!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: As soon as they could talk sense they went to the Chancellor and within days more shockin' tales of the Sea Spirit's wrath came in.

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: The Chancellor called a meeting for all us local seafarin' folk and we agreed action must be taken!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Ain't nothin' goin' t' take the seas from me, even if it is a powerful spirit!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Anyway, it was decided that we'd setup a base 'ere amongst these ruins, and so the Spirit Anglers was formed!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Don't ask me what the ruins used to be. And it's not like Menaphos can 'ave a say!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Whatever they are, they make a fine base for the Spirit Anglers!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Since moving in, we've been recruiting fisherfolk from all over, and some of the readin' types 'ave been studyin' Tempoross durin' our trips to subdue it.

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: I like t' get stuck in, me-self; face off toe t' toe with the beastie. I'll be right by your side when you go out there!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well that's encouraging, I think...

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: I'm still 'ere, ain't I?

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Anyway, there's plenty o' research going on, so maybe you can find some notes lyin' around if ye want to know more.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Ahoy there! What can I 'elp ye with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you remind me what to do on the island?

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: The ships on the dock regularly embark to Tempoross Cove. Once there, you'll need to keep the cannons loaded with Harpoonfish t' weaken the Spirit. You can fish 'em on the island.

sections.title: Attempting to board the ship without having the requirements

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Sorry, it's pretty rough out there and you look like you could do with more experience.

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: We did it! Tempoross has been sudbued once again. Well done!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Take a well deserved rest but don't get too comfy, it'll regain its energy soon enough!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What should I do now?

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: We usually find some debris washed up near the docks back at Unkah. Feel free t' have a look. Ya might find somethin' useful!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: It won't be long before Tempoross regains enough energy to be a problem and we'll have to wrangle it again. Hopefully we can count on you to 'elp!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm ready to leave.

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Aye aye!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: What do you need, adventurer? There is a battle to fight!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I help?

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Get yerself a harpoon from the crate on the ship, then go fish around the island t' catch some harpoonfish. They make fer fine ammo against Tempoross!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Once ye caught some, ye can cook 'em at the shrines on the island if ye want 'em to pack more of a punch. Then come back t' the ship an' load 'em in the ammunition crates next to the cannons.

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Our cannoneers will get t' firin' the harpoonfish at Tempoross. When it's weak an' submerges to recover its energy, get down to the jetty next t' the ship an' fish those spirit pools.

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Be quick with fishin' those spirit pools though, or it'll come back so strong we'll have to abandon the fight! With any luck, we'll weaken those spirit fish enough t' subdue Tempoross. Now get t' the fight, sailor!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Aye aye!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What should I watch out for?

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: If Tempoross electrocutes a cannon t' stop it from firin', ya better load your harpoonfish into the other ammunition crates t' keep them cannons firin' instead.

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Also, make sure t' grab a rope from the ship crates an' keep an eye out for big waves. We'll make sure t' shout about them. Then ye best quickly tether yerself t' an island totem pole or ship mast with that rope.

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: If the waves break the totem pole or ship mast, ye can grab a hammer from the ship crates t' fix 'em up before the next big wave hits.

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Oh, an' keep an eye out for lightnin' clouds causin' fires. Get a bucket from the ship crates, fill it with water at a pump, and get t' puttin it out before it spreads.

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: If ye get hit by the waves or fire, don't be surprised when ye lose those fish an' tools ye gathered. Now get t' the fight, sailor!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Aye aye!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want to leave.

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Really? You will receive no reward if you do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I really want to leave.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I don't want to leave.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll get on with the fighting.

sections.title: Succeeding in subduing Tempoross with no reward tokens

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Excellent work out there! The seas are safe for a little longer thanks to you!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: We usually find some debris washed up near the docks. Feel free to have a look. Ya might find somethin' useful!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Argh, we let that storm grow too fierce... As soon as it's safe we'll 'ead straight back out!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Aye aye, Cap'n!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Join the Spirit Anglers!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Plenty of room for more adventurers!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Come and help us fight Tempoross!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: It'll be worth your while...

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: To the boats! We'll set sail soon!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: We'll set sail in the next [25/20/15/10/5] seconds.

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Let's get underway!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Belay that! We'll try again later.

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Tempoross will surface soon, prepare yourselves!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: More fish!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Load those cannons!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Keep an eye on the waves!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Tempoross is drawing in water, prepare yourselves!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: The mast has been damaged!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Storm clouds are rolling in, get your buckets ready!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Tempoross has disabled a cannon! Switch to another!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Tempoross has submerged, fish from the whirlpools!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Tempoross has surfaced, keep those cannons firing!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Tempoross has retreated to the depths!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: Tempoross has gathered too much energy!

lines.speaker: Captain Pudi
lines.text: The storm has grown too strong, we must retreat!
